debug_info.goal:
L : Logic ℕ
φ ψ χ ξ : Formula ℕ
T : LO.Propositional.FTheory L
hT : χ ➝ ξ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
inst✝ : Entailment.F L
hφψ : φ ⋎ ψ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction_omega L χ ξ T hT
hφ : φ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction_omega L χ ξ T hT
hψ : ψ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction_omega L χ ξ T hT
left✝¹ : χ ➝ φ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
Γ : Finset (Formula ℕ)
hΓ₁ : ↑Γ ⊆ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT (encode φ)
hΓ₂ : Γ.conj ⋏ φ ➝ ξ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
left✝ : χ ➝ ψ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
Δ : Finset (Formula ℕ)
hΔ₁ : ↑Δ ⊆ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT (encode ψ)
hΔ₂ : Δ.conj ⋏ ψ ➝ ξ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
m : ℕ := max (encode φ) (encode ψ)
⊢ ↑(Γ ∪ Δ) ⊆ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT m

proof:
intro δ hδ
    have hδ' : δ ∈ Γ ∨ δ ∈ Δ := by
      simpa [Finset.mem_union] using hδ
    cases hδ' with
    | inl hΓδ =>
        have hle : encode φ ≤ m := le_max_left _ _
        exact monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) hle (hΓ₁ (by exact hΓδ))
    | inr hΔδ =>
        have hle : encode ψ ≤ m := le_max_right _ _
        exact monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) hle (hΔ₁ (by exact hΔδ))
failed_attempts:
intro δ hδ
    have hδ' : δ ∈ Γ ∨ δ ∈ Δ := by
      simpa [Finset.mem_coe, Finset.mem_union] using hδ
    cases hδ' with
    | inl hδΓ =>
      have : (δ : Formula ℕ) ∈ construction T hT (encode φ) := hΓ₁ (by simpa using hδΓ)
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (χ := χ) (ξ := ξ) (δ := δ) (le_max_left _ _)) this
    | inr hδΔ =>
      have : (δ : Formula ℕ) ∈ construction T hT (encode ψ) := hΔ₁ (by simpa using hδΔ)
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (χ := χ) (ξ := ξ) (δ := δ) (le_max_right _ _)) this

intro δ hδ
    have hδ' : δ ∈ Γ ∨ δ ∈ Δ := by
      simpa [Finset.mem_coe, Finset.mem_union] using hδ
    cases hδ' with
    | inl hΓ =>
      have : δ ∈ construction T hT (encode φ) := hΓ₁ (by simpa using hΓ)
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (δ := δ) (by exact le_max_left _ _)) this
    | inr hΔ =>
      have : δ ∈ construction T hT (encode ψ) := hΔ₁ (by simpa using hΔ)
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (δ := δ) (by exact le_max_right _ _)) this
successful_attempts:
intro δ hδ
    have hδ' : δ ∈ Γ ∨ δ ∈ Δ := by
      simpa [Finset.mem_union] using hδ
    cases hδ' with
    | inl hΓδ =>
        have hle : encode φ ≤ m := le_max_left _ _
        exact monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) hle (hΓ₁ (by exact hΓδ))
    | inr hΔδ =>
        have hle : encode ψ ≤ m := le_max_right _ _
        exact monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) hle (hΔ₁ (by exact hΔδ))

intro δ hδ
    have hδ' : δ ∈ Γ ∪ Δ := hδ
    have hmem : δ ∈ Γ ∨ δ ∈ Δ := by
      simpa [Finset.mem_union] using hδ'
    cases hmem with
    | inl hΓ =>
      have hle : encode φ ≤ m := le_max_left _ _
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) hle) (hΓ₁ hΓ)
    | inr hΔ =>
      have hle : encode ψ ≤ m := le_max_right _ _
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) hle) (hΔ₁ hΔ)

intro δ hδ
    have hδ' : δ ∈ Γ ∪ Δ := hδ
    have hmem : δ ∈ Γ ∨ δ ∈ Δ := by
      simpa [Finset.mem_union] using hδ'
    cases hmem with
    | inl hΓ =>
      have hle : encode φ ≤ m := le_max_left _ _
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) hle) (hΓ₁ hΓ)
    | inr hΔ =>
      have hle : encode ψ ≤ m := le_max_right _ _
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) hle) (hΔ₁ hΔ)

intro δ hδ
    have hδ' : δ ∈ (Γ : Set (Formula ℕ)) ∨ δ ∈ (Δ : Set (Formula ℕ)) := by
      simpa [Finset.mem_coe, Finset.mem_union] using hδ
    rcases hδ' with hδΓ | hδΔ
    · have hle : encode φ ≤ m := le_max_left _ _
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) hle) (hΓ₁ hδΓ)
    · have hle : encode ψ ≤ m := le_max_right _ _
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) hle) (hΔ₁ hδΔ)

intro δ hδ
    have hδ' : δ ∈ Γ ∨ δ ∈ Δ := by
      simpa [Finset.mem_coe, Finset.mem_union] using hδ
    cases hδ' with
    | inl hΓδ =>
      have hle : encode φ ≤ m := le_max_left _ _
      exact monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) hle (hΓ₁ (by simpa [Finset.mem_coe] using hΓδ))
    | inr hΔδ =>
      have hle : encode ψ ≤ m := le_max_right _ _
      exact monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) hle (hΔ₁ (by simpa [Finset.mem_coe] using hΔδ))

intro θ hθ
    have hθ' : θ ∈ (Γ ∪ Δ) := by simpa using hθ
    rcases Finset.mem_union.mp hθ' with hθΓ | hθΔ
    · have : θ ∈ construction T hT (encode φ) := hΓ₁ (by simpa using hθΓ)
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (by
        exact le_trans (le_max_left _ _) (le_rfl))) this
    · have : θ ∈ construction T hT (encode ψ) := hΔ₁ (by simpa using hθΔ)
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (by
        exact le_trans (le_max_right _ _) (le_rfl))) this

intro θ hθ
    have hθ' : θ ∈ Γ ∨ θ ∈ Δ := by
      simpa [Finset.mem_coe, Finset.mem_union] using hθ
    cases hθ' with
    | inl hΓθ =>
      have hle : encode φ ≤ m := by exact le_max_left _ _
      have hsub : construction T hT (encode φ) ⊆ construction T hT m := monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) hle
      exact hsub (hΓ₁ (by simpa [Finset.mem_coe] using hΓθ))
    | inr hΔθ =>
      have hle : encode ψ ≤ m := by exact le_max_right _ _
      have hsub : construction T hT (encode ψ) ⊆ construction T hT m := monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) hle
      exact hsub (hΔ₁ (by simpa [Finset.mem_coe] using hΔθ))

intro δ hδ
    have hδ' : δ ∈ Γ ∨ δ ∈ Δ := by
      simpa [Finset.mem_coe, Finset.mem_union] using hδ
    rcases hδ' with hδΓ | hδΔ
    · have : δ ∈ construction T hT (encode φ) := hΓ₁ (by simpa using hδΓ)
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (show encode φ ≤ m from le_max_left _ _)) this
    · have : δ ∈ construction T hT (encode ψ) := hΔ₁ (by simpa using hδΔ)
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (show encode ψ ≤ m from le_max_right _ _)) this

intro δ hδ
    have hδ' : δ ∈ Γ ∨ δ ∈ Δ := by
      simpa [Finset.mem_union] using hδ
    rcases hδ' with hδ' | hδ'
    · exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (hij := le_max_left _ _)) (hΓ₁ hδ')
    · exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (hij := le_max_right _ _)) (hΔ₁ hδ')

intro δ hδ
    have hδ' : δ ∈ Γ ∨ δ ∈ Δ := by
      simpa [Finset.mem_union] using hδ
    cases hδ' with
    | inl hΓ =>
      have hΓ' : δ ∈ construction T hT (encode φ) := hΓ₁ hΓ
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (i := encode φ) (j := m) (by
        exact le_trans (Nat.le_max_left _ _) (le_rfl))) hΓ'
    | inr hΔ =>
      have hΔ' : δ ∈ construction T hT (encode ψ) := hΔ₁ hΔ
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (i := encode ψ) (j := m) (by
        exact le_trans (Nat.le_max_right _ _) (le_rfl))) hΔ'

intro θ hθ
    have hθ' : θ ∈ Γ ∨ θ ∈ Δ := by
      simpa [Finset.mem_coe, Finset.mem_union] using hθ
    cases hθ' with
    | inl hθΓ =>
      have hle : encode φ ≤ m := le_max_left _ _
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) hle) (hΓ₁ (by simpa [Finset.mem_coe] using hθΓ))
    | inr hθΔ =>
      have hle : encode ψ ≤ m := le_max_right _ _
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) hle) (hΔ₁ (by simpa [Finset.mem_coe] using hθΔ))

intro θ hθ
    have hθ' : θ ∈ Γ ∨ θ ∈ Δ := by
      simpa [Finset.mem_coe, Finset.mem_union] using hθ
    rcases hθ' with hθΓ | hθΔ
    · have : θ ∈ construction T hT (encode φ) := hΓ₁ (by simpa using hθΓ)
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (show encode φ ≤ m from le_max_left _ _)) this
    · have : θ ∈ construction T hT (encode ψ) := hΔ₁ (by simpa using hθΔ)
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (show encode ψ ≤ m from le_max_right _ _)) this

intro δ hδ
    have hδ' : δ ∈ (Γ ∪ Δ) := by simpa using hδ
    rcases Finset.mem_union.mp hδ' with (hδΓ | hδΔ)
    · have : δ ∈ construction T hT (encode φ) := hΓ₁ (by simpa using hδΓ)
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (by
        exact le_trans (le_max_left _ _) (le_of_eq rfl))) this
    · have : δ ∈ construction T hT (encode ψ) := hΔ₁ (by simpa using hδΔ)
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (by
        exact le_trans (le_max_right _ _) (le_of_eq rfl))) this

intro δ hδ
    have hδ' : δ ∈ Γ ∨ δ ∈ Δ := by
      simpa [Finset.mem_coe, Finset.mem_union] using hδ
    cases hδ' with
    | inl hδΓ =>
      have hmem : δ ∈ construction T hT (encode φ) := hΓ₁ (by simpa [Finset.mem_coe] using hδΓ)
      have hle : encode φ ≤ m := le_max_left _ _
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) hle) hmem
    | inr hδΔ =>
      have hmem : δ ∈ construction T hT (encode ψ) := hΔ₁ (by simpa [Finset.mem_coe] using hδΔ)
      have hle : encode ψ ≤ m := le_max_right _ _
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) hle) hmem

intro δ hδ
    have hδ' : δ ∈ Γ ∨ δ ∈ Δ := by
      simpa [Finset.mem_coe, Finset.mem_union] using hδ
    cases hδ' with
    | inl hΓδ =>
      have hmem : δ ∈ construction T hT (encode φ) := hΓ₁ (by simpa using hΓδ)
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (i := encode φ) (j := m) (by
        exact le_max_left _ _)) hmem
    | inr hΔδ =>
      have hmem : δ ∈ construction T hT (encode ψ) := hΔ₁ (by simpa using hΔδ)
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (i := encode ψ) (j := m) (by
        exact le_max_right _ _)) hmem

intro δ hδ
    have hδ' : δ ∈ (Γ ∪ Δ) := hδ
    have hδ'' : δ ∈ Γ ∨ δ ∈ Δ := by
      simpa [Finset.mem_union] using hδ'
    cases hδ'' with
    | inl hΓ =>
        have hΓm : construction T hT (encode φ) ⊆ construction T hT m := by
          apply monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT)
          exact le_trans (le_max_left _ _) le_rfl
        exact hΓm (hΓ₁ hΓ)
    | inr hΔ =>
        have hΔm : construction T hT (encode ψ) ⊆ construction T hT m := by
          apply monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT)
          exact le_trans (le_max_right _ _) le_rfl
        exact hΔm (hΔ₁ hΔ)

intro δ hδ
    have hδ' : δ ∈ Γ ∨ δ ∈ Δ := by
      simpa [Finset.mem_coe, Finset.mem_union] using hδ
    cases hδ' with
    | inl hΓ =>
      have hle : encode φ ≤ m := le_max_left _ _
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) hle) (hΓ₁ (by simpa using hΓ))
    | inr hΔ =>
      have hle : encode ψ ≤ m := le_max_right _ _
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) hle) (hΔ₁ (by simpa using hΔ))

intro δ hδ
    have hδ' : δ ∈ Γ ∨ δ ∈ Δ := by
      simpa [Finset.mem_coe, Finset.mem_union] using hδ
    rcases hδ' with (hδ | hδ)
    · have : δ ∈ construction T hT (encode φ) := hΓ₁ (by simpa [Finset.mem_coe] using hδ)
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (show encode φ ≤ m from le_max_left _ _)) this
    · have : δ ∈ construction T hT (encode ψ) := hΔ₁ (by simpa [Finset.mem_coe] using hδ)
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (show encode ψ ≤ m from le_max_right _ _)) this

intro δ hδ
    have hδ' : δ ∈ Γ ∨ δ ∈ Δ := by
      simpa [Finset.mem_coe, Finset.mem_union] using hδ
    cases hδ' with
    | inl hδΓ =>
      have hmem : δ ∈ construction T hT (encode φ) := hΓ₁ (by simpa [Finset.mem_coe] using hδΓ)
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (i := encode φ) (j := m) (by
        exact le_trans (le_max_left _ _) (le_rfl))) hmem
    | inr hδΔ =>
      have hmem : δ ∈ construction T hT (encode ψ) := hΔ₁ (by simpa [Finset.mem_coe] using hδΔ)
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (i := encode ψ) (j := m) (by
        exact le_trans (le_max_right _ _) (le_rfl))) hmem

intro δ hδ
    have hδ' : δ ∈ (Γ ∪ Δ) := hδ
    rcases Finset.mem_union.mp hδ' with hδΓ | hδΔ
    · have : δ ∈ construction T hT (encode φ) := hΓ₁ hδΓ
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (i := encode φ) (j := m) (by
        exact le_trans (le_max_left _ _) le_rfl)) this
    · have : δ ∈ construction T hT (encode ψ) := hΔ₁ hδΔ
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (i := encode ψ) (j := m) (by
        exact le_trans (le_max_right _ _) le_rfl)) this

intro δ hδ
    have hδ' : δ ∈ Γ ∨ δ ∈ Δ := by
      simpa [Finset.mem_coe, Finset.mem_union] using hδ
    cases hδ' with
    | inl hδΓ =>
      have : δ ∈ construction T hT (encode φ) := hΓ₁ (by simpa using hδΓ)
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (i := encode φ) (j := m) (by
        exact le_trans (Nat.le_max_left _ _) (le_rfl))) this
    | inr hδΔ =>
      have : δ ∈ construction T hT (encode ψ) := hΔ₁ (by simpa using hδΔ)
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (i := encode ψ) (j := m) (by
        exact le_trans (Nat.le_max_right _ _) (le_rfl))) this

intro δ hδ
    have hδ' : δ ∈ (Γ : Set (Formula ℕ)) ∨ δ ∈ (Δ : Set (Formula ℕ)) := by
      simpa [Finset.coe_union, Set.mem_union] using hδ
    cases hδ' with
    | inl hΓ =>
      have hΓδ : δ ∈ Γ := by simpa using hΓ
      have : δ ∈ construction T hT (encode φ) := hΓ₁ (by simpa using hΓδ)
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (i := encode φ) (j := m) (by
        exact le_max_left _ _)) this
    | inr hΔ =>
      have hΔδ : δ ∈ Δ := by simpa using hΔ
      have : δ ∈ construction T hT (encode ψ) := hΔ₁ (by simpa using hΔδ)
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (i := encode ψ) (j := m) (by
        exact le_max_right _ _)) this

intro δ hδ
    have hδ' : δ ∈ Γ ∨ δ ∈ Δ := by
      simpa [Finset.mem_union] using hδ
    cases hδ' with
    | inl hΓδ =>
      have hΓδ' : δ ∈ construction T hT (encode φ) := hΓ₁ hΓδ
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (i := encode φ) (j := m) (by
        exact le_max_left _ _)) hΓδ'
    | inr hΔδ =>
      have hΔδ' : δ ∈ construction T hT (encode ψ) := hΔ₁ hΔδ
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (i := encode ψ) (j := m) (by
        exact le_max_right _ _)) hΔδ'

intro δ hδ
    have hδ' : δ ∈ (Γ ∪ Δ) := by simpa using hδ
    have hmφ : encode φ ≤ m := le_max_left _ _
    have hmψ : encode ψ ≤ m := le_max_right _ _
    have hmonoφ := monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (i := encode φ) (j := m) hmφ
    have hmonoψ := monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (i := encode ψ) (j := m) hmψ
    have hΓm : (↑Γ : Set (Formula ℕ)) ⊆ construction T hT m := Set.Subset.trans hΓ₁ hmonoφ
    have hΔm : (↑Δ : Set (Formula ℕ)) ⊆ construction T hT m := Set.Subset.trans hΔ₁ hmonoψ
    rcases Finset.mem_union.mp hδ' with hδΓ | hδΔ
    · exact hΓm (by simpa using hδΓ)
    · exact hΔm (by simpa using hδΔ)

intro δ hδ
    have hδ' : δ ∈ Γ ∪ Δ := hδ
    have hδ'' : δ ∈ Γ ∨ δ ∈ Δ := by
      simpa [Finset.mem_union] using hδ'
    cases hδ'' with
    | inl hΓ =>
      have : (δ : Formula ℕ) ∈ construction T hT (encode φ) := hΓ₁ hΓ
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (i := encode φ) (j := m) (by
        exact le_max_left _ _)) this
    | inr hΔ =>
      have : (δ : Formula ℕ) ∈ construction T hT (encode ψ) := hΔ₁ hΔ
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (i := encode ψ) (j := m) (by
        exact le_max_right _ _)) this

intro δ hδ
    have hδ' : δ ∈ Γ ∨ δ ∈ Δ := by
      simpa [Finset.mem_coe, Set.mem_union, Finset.mem_union] using hδ
    cases hδ' with
    | inl hΓ =>
      have : δ ∈ construction T hT (encode φ) := hΓ₁ (by simpa using hΓ)
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (i := encode φ) (j := m) (by exact le_max_left _ _)) this
    | inr hΔ =>
      have : δ ∈ construction T hT (encode ψ) := hΔ₁ (by simpa using hΔ)
      exact (monotone_construction (T := T) (hT := hT) (i := encode ψ) (j := m) (by exact le_max_right _ _)) this
